message:
refactor: extract isTextInputLike to shared utils module

Move the isTextInputLike() helper from lib/site-state.tsx into
lib/utils.ts so it can be reused across components that need to
suppress keyboard shortcuts while the user is typing. The function
detects <input>, <textarea>, <select>, and contenteditable elements.

site-state.tsx now imports from the shared module instead of defining
its own local copy, eliminating duplication and establishing a single
canonical implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
